summary.lv: Webbing meklē IT Support Technician pirmā līmeņa tehniskajam atbalstam globālā IT komandā. Darbs klātienē ar atalgojumu €1600–2000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Webbing is looking for an IT Support Technician to provide first-line technical support across the company in an on-site role offering €1,600–2,000/month.
